title: Managed audit manual sandbox connection credential resolver approval prerequisite artifact upstream echo verification

artifactIntakePlan.sourceSpan: Node v305 + planned Java v142 + planned mini-kv v135
artifactIntakePlan.purpose: Capture non-secret approval prerequisite handles and review statuses required before any managed audit credential resolver runtime shell implementation can be discussed.

requiredFields.label: Artifact id
requiredFields.purpose: Trace this intake artifact across Node, Java, and mini-kv evidence.

requiredFields.label: Source Node verification
requiredFields.purpose: Bind the artifact to the v305 upstream echo verification.

requiredFields.label: Operator approval reference
requiredFields.acceptedShape: non-secret approval ticket or review id
requiredFields.purpose: Prove a human approval review exists before any runtime shell step.

requiredFields.label: Credential handle review status
requiredFields.purpose: Show that only a credential handle was reviewed.

requiredFields.label: Endpoint handle allowlist review status
requiredFields.acceptedShape: endpoint handle + allowlist status, no raw URL
requiredFields.purpose: Show that only an endpoint handle was reviewed.

requiredFields.label: No-network safety test reference
requiredFields.purpose: Prove the intake remains offline and does not send HTTP/TCP.

requiredFields.label: Manual abort semantics reference
requiredFields.purpose: Document how an operator stops before any runtime shell invocation.

requiredFields.label: Rollback semantics reference
requiredFields.purpose: Document rollback expectations without executing deployment or rollback.

requiredFields.label: Java echo required version
requiredFields.purpose: Tell Java exactly which read-only artifact contract to echo.

requiredFields.label: mini-kv receipt required version
requiredFields.purpose: Tell mini-kv exactly which non-participation receipt to emit.

requiredFields.label: Created by operator identity
requiredFields.purpose: Bind the artifact to a non-secret operator identity.

requiredFields.label: Audit correlation id
requiredFields.purpose: Link all later evidence without embedding secret material.

prohibitedFields.reason: Credential values are never accepted by Node, Java, or mini-kv in this stage.
Raw endpoint URLs stay outside the artifact; only reviewed endpoint handles are allowed.
Secret provider configuration would imply implementation, not intake planning.
Resolver client configuration would imply implementation, not intake planning.
External HTTP/TCP payloads are forbidden before a later explicit connection version.
Approval ledger writes are Java-side production behavior and are blocked here.
Schema migration SQL is blocked in this artifact intake plan.
mini-kv must remain non-authoritative and read-only.

rejectionReasons.message: Reject artifacts without a non-secret operator approval reference.
Reject artifacts that include credential values instead of handles.
Reject artifacts that include raw endpoint URLs instead of endpoint handles.
Reject artifacts that do not cite a no-network safety check.
Reject artifacts missing abort or rollback semantics.
Reject completion claims until Java v142 and mini-kv v135 echo this contract.
Reject requests to implement, enable, or invoke a runtime shell.
Reject requests to send HTTP/TCP or instantiate providers/clients.
Reject ledger writes, SQL migrations, deployments, rollbacks, and mini-kv write/admin commands.

noGoBoundaries.message: No runtime shell implementation belongs in v306.
No runtime shell invocation is allowed.
No execution path is opened by an intake plan.
No managed audit connection is opened.
No credential value is read or stored.
No raw endpoint URL is parsed or rendered.
No secret provider, resolver client, fake provider, or fake client is instantiated.
No approval ledger write is performed.
Node does not start Java, mini-kv, or external audit services.

upstreamEchoRequests.requestedEcho: Echo the v306 artifact schema, required fields, rejection reasons, and no-go boundaries without ledger writes, SQL, deployment, rollback, or external managed audit calls.
Emit a read-only non-participation receipt for the v306 artifact schema without LOAD, COMPACT, RESTORE, SETNXEX, writes, or authority claims.

echoVerification.sourceSpan: Node v306 + Java v142 + mini-kv v135

warnings.message: v307 proves Java v142 and mini-kv v135 echoed the Node v306 artifact contract; it does not approve or implement a runtime shell.

recommendations.message: The next Node step may define how a human-supplied approval artifact is reviewed, but must still reject credential values and raw endpoint URLs.
Do not convert upstream echo alignment into implementation permission; require a separate artifact review packet and explicit approval gates.

evidenceEndpoints.miniKvV135Walkthrough: D:/C/mini-kv/代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段_第二册/191-version-135-credential-resolver-approval-prerequisite-artifact-intake-non-participation-receipt.md

nextActions: Archive Node v307 as the read-only verification that Java v142 and mini-kv v135 echoed the Node v306 approval prerequisite artifact contract.
Keep disabled runtime shell implementation and invocation blocked after v307; this version only proves the artifact contract was echoed upstream.

The next plan may define a human-supplied approval artifact review packet, but it must still reject credential values, raw endpoint URLs, provider/client config, HTTP/TCP calls, ledger writes, schema migration, mini-kv writes/admin commands, and automatic upstream start.
